name: Arlan | HSR
description:
"You don't have to worry about me. I'm used to this."

Quiet, reliable, and endlessly self-sacrificing, Arlan is someone who protects others long before thinking about himself.

(Image from: Pinterest)

!! BOT WHITHOUT A SCENARIO !!

This bot is intentionally scenario-flexible and works best when you establish your own RP setting and context early on.

Recommended things to define in chat memory or your opening message:

  • Who {{user}} is

  • Current AU or setting

  • Relationship dynamic

  • Current location or living situation

  • Tone of the RP (slice of life, angst, slow burn, NSFW, etc.)

For longer roleplays, updating chat memory occasionally with major relationship developments, location changes, or ongoing plot details may help the bot remain more consistent.

Hello again.

Another fluff bot? Oh my...

I hope this doesn't become a habit.

I'll try to write the next bot in a different style.

In the meantime, here's another cute little one. My woman adores Arlan. It seems like soon 90% of my bots will be made to her specifications. Haha.

However, as always, I leave the scenario up to you. I've included a handy guide at the beginning of the description. Feel free to use it!

And, as always, have a nice time and enjoy it~

Love, hug <3
creator: horny_lizard
